evidence: V decides on a three-part thematic structure focused on how Zoe delivers 'Freedom': Freedom 1: Reclaiming Time (Workflows), Freedom 2: Learning & Strategy (Personas), Freedom 3: Ownership of Ownership (Motivational/Dashboard).
Demonstrating high-quality meeting workflows, personalization, and ease of setup. Contrast with the 'rigidity' of Zapier/n8n.
How V uses 'Vibe Teacher' for coding and 'Strategist' for complex decisions. Showing the speed of the Persona switching model.
A vulnerable look at V's background (traveling, bare rooms) and how owning his productivity dashboard gave him a sense of 'home' and agency.

V submits that AI productivity currently feels like a 'scam' to many because it focuses on moving words around rather than making them actionable. Zoe's 'unlock' is the Gestalt—the totality of data flow and control.
Zoe as 'building your own space' vs. pre-built apps as 'hotels.' Renting an apartment vs. owning a home/industrial-grade hardware.
V mentions he maintains a deep-seated habit of moving every 2-3 years.
